subject: An exclusive system for DePasquale The Spa
body:
DePasquale The Spa's massive 26,000 sq ft facility signals the scale MaRe is designed to support. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, lifts retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+ by tying every Philip Martin's recommendation to real scalp data. We partner exclusively with venues that match our standard — I'd like to explore whether yours does.
— Rebecca
